title: Polandball
description:
Resource kit on the Polandball!
It's a data package composed of Polandball tool sets! You can also see players holding spherical weapons for PVP.
body:
Here's a project being worked on by Breeze! An awesome resource pack about the Polish Ball!
As its summary suggests, this resource pack supports players in playing Minecraft with Polandball tools, I'm making my first resource pack, but I'll do my best to make it good!
